name: TANKBOX
short_description: TANKBOX is a top-down perspective/orthographic arcade shooter. Fight it out against specialized AI-controlled tanks cooperatively with a friend or by yourself.
detailed_description:
TANKBOX is a simple action arcade game in which you control your own little toy tank to battle it out against other AI controlled tanks, all residing in a simple wooden box.

Be warned, TANKBOX might take more strategy than you think!

  • Local/Online 2 Player Co-operative Multiplayer. Local co-op requires a controller.
  • 12 different colored AI tanks that have their own unique abilities and personalities.
  • 200 Levels split over 2 campaigns (100 each).
  • An assortment of hats with some spicing up gameplay.
  • Included Campaign Editor (up to 100 levels) with workshop support.
